languages.text: {n}Слова приговора, зачитанные Инквизитором вашему предку, все еще звенят в ушах. Найти живого Себериана фон Валанциуса за мгновение до его казни — звучит как ксеносская насмешка. Впрочем, как и все, что вы увидели. Как и то, что вы снова стоите там, откуда начали, словно недовольный хозяин выставил вас за порог, как незваных гостей.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Слова приговора, зачитанные Инквизитором вашему предку, все еще звенят в ушах. Найти живого Себериана фон Валанциуса за мгновение до его казни — звучит как ксеносская насмешка. Впрочем, как и все, что вы увидели. Как и то, что вы снова стоите там, откуда начали, словно недовольный хозяин выставил вас за порог, как незваных гостей.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The sentence read out by the Inquisitor to your ancestor still rings in your ears. To find Seberian von Valancius alive mere moments before his execution — what a foul xenos joke. Everything you have seen here seems designed to mock you, including the fact that you are back where you started, as though a disgruntled host had tossed you out the door like unwanted guests.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Слова приговора, зачитанные Инквизитором вашему предку, все еще звенят в ушах. Найти живого Себериана фон Валанциуса за мгновение до его казни — звучит как ксеносская насмешка. Впрочем, как и все, что вы увидели. Как и то, что вы снова стоите там, откуда начали, словно недовольный хозяин выставил вас за порог, как незваных гостей.{/n}

{n}The sentence read out by the Inquisitor to your ancestor still rings in your ears. To find Seberian von Valancius alive mere moments before his execution — what a foul xenos joke. Everything you have seen here seems designed to mock you, including the fact that you are back where you started, as though a disgruntled host had tossed you out the door like unwanted guests.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Urteil, das der Inquisitor über deinen Ahnherrn gefällt hat, hallt noch immer in deinen Ohren wider. Dass du Seberian von Valancius wenige Sekunden vor seiner Hinrichtung gefunden hast ... was für ein übler Scherz des Xenos. Alles, was du gesehen hast, scheint dazu zu dienen, dich zu verspotten, einschließlich des Umstandes, dass du wieder ganz am Anfang stehst, als hätte euch ein unwirscher Gastgeber wie unerwünschte Besucher aus dem Haus geworfen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sentence read out by the Inquisitor to your ancestor still rings in your ears. To find Seberian von Valancius alive mere moments before his execution — what a foul xenos joke. Everything you have seen here seems designed to mock you, including the fact that you are back where you started, as though a disgruntled host had tossed you out the door like unwanted guests.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Urteil, das der Inquisitor über deinen Ahnherrn gefällt hat, hallt noch immer in deinen Ohren wider. Dass du Seberian von Valancius wenige Sekunden vor seiner Hinrichtung gefunden hast ... was für ein übler Scherz des Xenos. Alles, was du gesehen hast, scheint dazu zu dienen, dich zu verspotten, einschließlich des Umstandes, dass du wieder ganz am Anfang stehst, als hätte euch ein unwirscher Gastgeber wie unerwünschte Besucher aus dem Haus geworfen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}审判官向你先祖宣读的判决依然在你耳边回响。在处决前的最后一刻才发现塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯还活着，真是个恶毒的异形笑话。你在这里看到的一切，都像是在故意嘲弄你，包括你重新回到起点的这个事实，也像是一个不耐烦的主人把你这不受欢迎的客人直接轰出了门。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sentence read out by the Inquisitor to your ancestor still rings in your ears. To find Seberian von Valancius alive mere moments before his execution — what a foul xenos joke. Everything you have seen here seems designed to mock you, including the fact that you are back where you started, as though a disgruntled host had tossed you out the door like unwanted guests.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}审判官向你先祖宣读的判决依然在你耳边回响。在处决前的最后一刻才发现塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯还活着，真是个恶毒的异形笑话。你在这里看到的一切，都像是在故意嘲弄你，包括你重新回到起点的这个事实，也像是一个不耐烦的主人把你这不受欢迎的客人直接轰出了门。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La sentence prononcée par l'Inquisiteur à l'encontre de votre ancêtre résonne encore à vos oreilles. Trouver Seberian von Valancius, en vie, quelques instants seulement avant son exécution... Voilà bien une cruelle plaisanterie xénos. Toute la situation semble conçue pour vous tourner en dérision, y compris le fait que vous êtes de retour au point départ, comme si vous n'aviez été {mf|qu'un invité|0qu'une invitée} indésirable dont un hôte peu amène se serait débarrassé.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sentence read out by the Inquisitor to your ancestor still rings in your ears. To find Seberian von Valancius alive mere moments before his execution — what a foul xenos joke. Everything you have seen here seems designed to mock you, including the fact that you are back where you started, as though a disgruntled host had tossed you out the door like unwanted guests.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La sentence prononcée par l'Inquisiteur à l'encontre de votre ancêtre résonne encore à vos oreilles. Trouver Seberian von Valancius, en vie, quelques instants seulement avant son exécution... Voilà bien une cruelle plaisanterie xénos. Toute la situation semble conçue pour vous tourner en dérision, y compris le fait que vous êtes de retour au point départ, comme si vous n'aviez été {mf|qu'un invité|0qu'une invitée} indésirable dont un hôte peu amène se serait débarrassé.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La sentencia que dictó el inquisidor a tu antepasado aún resuena en tus oídos. Encontrar a Seberian von Valancius con vida segundos antes de su ejecución... es como una perversa broma pesada de los xenos. Todo lo que has presenciado aquí parece ideado como una burla, incluido el hecho de que estás otra vez donde empezaste, como si un anfitrión descontento te hubiese echado a patadas de su casa.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sentence read out by the Inquisitor to your ancestor still rings in your ears. To find Seberian von Valancius alive mere moments before his execution — what a foul xenos joke. Everything you have seen here seems designed to mock you, including the fact that you are back where you started, as though a disgruntled host had tossed you out the door like unwanted guests.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La sentencia que dictó el inquisidor a tu antepasado aún resuena en tus oídos. Encontrar a Seberian von Valancius con vida segundos antes de su ejecución... es como una perversa broma pesada de los xenos. Todo lo que has presenciado aquí parece ideado como una burla, incluido el hecho de que estás otra vez donde empezaste, como si un anfitrión descontento te hubiese echado a patadas de su casa.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Engizisyoncu'nun atana okuduğu hüküm, hâlâ kulaklarında çınlıyor. Seberian von Valancius'u idamından sadece birkaç saniye önce sağ bulmak... Ne iğrenç bir zeno şakası. Başladığın yere geri dönmüş olman da dâhil olmak üzere burada gördüğün her şey, seninle alay etmek için tasarlanmış gibi. Sanki hoşnutsuz bir ev sahibi seni istenmeyen bir misafir gibi kapı dışarı ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sentence read out by the Inquisitor to your ancestor still rings in your ears. To find Seberian von Valancius alive mere moments before his execution — what a foul xenos joke. Everything you have seen here seems designed to mock you, including the fact that you are back where you started, as though a disgruntled host had tossed you out the door like unwanted guests.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Engizisyoncu'nun atana okuduğu hüküm, hâlâ kulaklarında çınlıyor. Seberian von Valancius'u idamından sadece birkaç saniye önce sağ bulmak... Ne iğrenç bir zeno şakası. Başladığın yere geri dönmüş olman da dâhil olmak üzere burada gördüğün her şey, seninle alay etmek için tasarlanmış gibi. Sanki hoşnutsuz bir ev sahibi seni istenmeyen bir misafir gibi kapı dışarı ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}審問官が祖先に向かって読み上げた宣告文が、今も耳にこだまする。処刑直前、セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスが生きているとは。何という不快な異種族のジョークだ。ここでの全ては、君を嘲笑うように設計されている。君が元の場所に戻っていることさえ、不快な気持ちの持ち主が嫌な客のように君を追い出したように見える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sentence read out by the Inquisitor to your ancestor still rings in your ears. Everything you have seen here seems designed to mock you, including the fact that you are back where you started, as though a disgruntled host had tossed you out the door like unwanted guests.{/n}
